claim: The text uses a combination of substitution and transposition ciphers in the biological section.
evidence_for: The biological section has higher entropy levels compared to other sections
The word-final glyph distribution in the biological section shows a higher frequency of 'l' and 'r', which are common in transposition ciphers
test: Run a mutual information test on the relationship between glyphs in the biological section
